Home · Services · Stump Grinding

Stump Grinding

Clean, complete stump removal — done right.

That old stump in the yard doesn't have to be a permanent feature. We use professional-grade equipment to grind stumps below grade and leave your yard ready for whatever you want to do next — replant, lay sod, or just enjoy the clear space.

What we do
We grind the stump down 4–6 inches below the surface, well past where roots could regrow. The grindings get cleaned up, leaving you with fresh soil ready for use.
Why it matters
Stumps attract pests, sprout new growth, and make mowing a hassle. Removing them properly the first time saves you headaches for years.
Property care
We protect surrounding grass, beds, and hardscape. Tarps down, careful equipment placement, full cleanup before we leave.
